particular.configuration.accelChangeChan:
Inverse chance of changing dust particle acceleration

Higher values = less frequent changes
180 means 1 in 180 chance per tick
particular.configuration.barrelBubbles.t: Enable bubbles rising from underwater barrels
particular.configuration.baseMaxAge.tool:
Base lifetime of cave dust particles in ticks

200 ticks = 10 seconds
Allow fireflies to spawn during rainy weather

Fireflies typically hide during rain
particular.configuration.cascades.toolti: Enable cascade particles for flowing water
particular.configuration.caveDust.toolti: Enable floating dust particles in caves
particular.configuration.chestBubbles.to: Enable bubbles rising from underwater chests
particular.configuration.color.tooltip:
RGB color value for cave dust particles

0x808080 = gray
Range: 0x000000 to 0xFFFFFF
particular.configuration.dailyRandom.too:
Random factors affecting firefly spawn rates throughout the day

List of values representing spawn probability at different times
Toggle various particle effects on or off
particular.configuration.endTime.tooltip:
Game time when fireflies stop spawning (in ticks)

23000 = late night (11:00 PM)
Range: 0 to 23999
particular.configuration.excludeBiomes.t:
List of biome IDs where cave dust will not spawn

Format: minecraft:biome_name
particular.configuration.fadeDuration.to:
How long dust particles take to fade out in ticks

20 ticks = 1 second
particular.configuration.fireflies.toolt: Enable firefly particles in suitable biomes at night
particular.configuration.fireflySettings: Configure firefly spawning conditions and behavior
particular.configuration.flowers.tooltip:
Spawn frequency modifier near flowers

Range: 0.0 to 1.0
particular.configuration.frequencyModifi: Control how often fireflies spawn near different plants
particular.configuration.grass.tooltip:
Spawn frequency modifier near grass blocks

Range: 0.0 to 1.0
particular.configuration.layFlatOnGround: Make leaves lay flat when they land on the ground
particular.configuration.layFlatRightAng: Snap leaf rotation to 90-degree angles when laying flat
particular.configuration.maxAcceleration:
Maximum acceleration for dust particle movement

Range: 0.0 to 1.0
particular.configuration.maxTemp.tooltip:
Maximum biome temperature for fireflies to spawn

0.99 = warm but not hot
Range: 0.0 to 2.0
particular.configuration.minFallDistance:
Minimum distance (in blocks) an entity must fall before creating water splash particles

0.0 = always create splashes
Range: 0.0 to 100.0
particular.configuration.minTemp.tooltip:
Minimum biome temperature for fireflies to spawn

0.5 = temperate climate
Range: 0.0 to 2.0
Enable bubble popping effects at the water surface
particular.configuration.rainRipples.too:
Enable ripple effects when rain hits water

Automatically disabled when shaders are active
particular.configuration.smallDroplets.t:
Enable water droplet particles for small splashes

Adds visual detail to gentle water entries
particular.configuration.soulSandBubbles: Enable bubbles rising from soul sand underwater
particular.configuration.spawnChance.too:
Inverse spawn chance

Higher values = less frequent spawning
particular.configuration.spawnRipples.to: Create ripple effects when leaves land on water
particular.configuration.startTime.toolt:
Game time when fireflies begin spawning (in ticks)

12000 = sunset (6:00 PM)
Range: 0 to 23999
particular.configuration.tallFlowers.too:
Spawn frequency modifier near tall flowers

Range: 0.0 to 1.0
particular.configuration.tallGrass.toolt:
Spawn frequency modifier near tall grass

Range: 0.0 to 1.0
particular.configuration.title: Particular Configuration
particular.configuration.waterDripRipple:
Enable ripple effects when water drips onto water surfaces

Automatically disabled when shaders are active
particular.configuration.waterSplash.too: Enable water splash particles when entities hit water
Enable spray particles at the bottom of waterfalls
